subject: [PATCH v5 19/21] nfsd: properly track requested child attributes

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch improves the way NFSv4 server handles child attributes in delegations by tracking the union of requested and supported attributes, and only encoding the attributes in that union when sending add/remove/rename updates. This change ensures that only valid attributes are sent to clients, preventing potential errors or inconsistencies. The patch modifies several files in the NFSv4 codebase to implement this new behavior, including nfsd/nfs4proc.c, nfsd/nfs4state.c, and nfsd/nfs4xdr.c.
